---
id: get-studio-statistics
title: "获取 Studio 统计信息"
description: "获取 Studio 统计信息，如设备数量、自动化数量、空间数量、场景数量等。"
sidebar_label: "获取 Studio 统计信息"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"获取 Studio 统计信息"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/studio/statistics"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



获取 Studio 统计信息，如设备数量、自动化数量、空间数量、场景数量等。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"dimensions","in":"query","description":"统计维度列表。支持 deviceCount（设备数量）、linkageCount（自动化数量）、spaceCount（空间数量）、sceneCount（场景数量）。URL 示例：dimensions=deviceCount,linkageCount,spaceCount,sceneCount 或 dimensions=deviceCount&dimensions=linkageCount","required":true,"schema":{"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"string","description":"Studio 统计维度","enum":["deviceCount","linkageCount","spaceCount","sceneCount"],"title":"StudioStatisticsDimension"}},"style":"form","explode":true,"example":["deviceCount","linkageCount","spaceCount","sceneCount"]}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","description":"Studio 统计信息；仅返回 dimensions 请求的统计字段","properties":{"deviceCount":{"type":"integer","description":"设备数量","example":128},"linkageCount":{"type":"integer","description":"自动化数量","example":24},"spaceCount":{"type":"integer","description":"空间数量","example":16},"sceneCount":{"type":"integer","description":"场景数量","example":12}},"title":"StudioStatisticsData"}}}],"example":{"type":"StudioStatisticsResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000021","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"deviceCount":128,"linkageCount":24,"spaceCount":16,"sceneCount":12}},"title":"StudioStatisticsResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数
